title: Pb with SPARQL subqueries + group by + filter exists
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE authors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, issued_date TEXT, unit_of TEXT);
INSERT INTO authors (id, name, issued_date, unit_of) VALUES (1, 'Olivier', '2020-01-15', 'https://data.archives-ouvertes.fr/structure/13009');
INSERT INTO authors (id, name, issued_date, unit_of) VALUES (2, 'Alice', '2018-05-20', 'https://data.archives-ouvertes.fr/structure/13009');
SELECT DISTINCT a.name FROM authors a WHERE a.issued_date >= '2019-01-01' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM authors b WHERE a.id = b.id AND b.name LIKE '%Olivier%');
SELECT a.name FROM authors a JOIN authors b ON a.id = b.id WHERE b.unit_of = 'https://data.archives-ouvertes.fr/structure/13009' GROUP BY a.name HAVING COUNT(b.id) > 0;
key_bug_features: SPARQL subqueries with group by and filter exists
